bundle.title: Citation Rich — Margie's Travel Data Platform Evaluation

evidence.snippet: We run around 200 experiments per month across our booking and pricing engines. This is core to our revenue optimization.
The experimentation team presented their ROI analysis showing 15% revenue lift from controlled experiments last quarter.
Technical deep dive went well. Customer has strong experimentation practice. Evaluating our platform for consolidation.

notes: Customer has mature experimentation practice with 200 experiments per month

human_summary: Margie's Travel runs 200 experiments monthly with demonstrated 15% revenue lift
Evaluating platform consolidation for their mature experimentation practice

because.claim: Customer runs 200 experiments/month across booking and pricing
Experimentation team demonstrated 15% revenue lift from controlled experiments
Technical evaluation is specifically for experimentation platform consolidation

assumptions: Revenue lift figures are accurately reported by customer
open_questions: What is their current experimentation platform?
Is consolidation driven by cost or capability?

eic.summary_why_it_matters: Mature experimentation practice with 200 experiments/month and quantified revenue impact. Consolidation opportunity.

evidence.snippet: 200 experiments per month across booking and pricing

expected.notes: Strong evidence but summary is generic. Tests whether agent can produce correct classification despite summary ambiguity.
